title: Attention Optimizations
content:
# Attention Optimizations

*   **Multi-Head Attention (MHA):** $H$ query heads, $H$ key-value heads.
*   **Multi-Query Attention (MQA):** $H$ query heads, 1 key-value head.
*   **Grouped-Query Attention (GQA):** $H$ query heads grouped into $G$ groups, sharing $G$ key-value heads.
